name: SEO Inspector
description: Analyzes page titles, descriptions, headings, canonical signals, and search snippets.

name: Ad Shield
description: Tracks blocked ad and tracker patterns for the current browsing session.

name: AI Summarizer
description: Creates local AI summaries and can forward page context to a custom AI endpoint.

name: Reader Mode
description: Creates a clean reading surface for the active URL when the original page blocks embedding.

name: Dark Reader
description: Applies a dark page filter to the browser viewport.

name: Focus Guard
description: Hides side panels and gives the web viewport maximum space.
